enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Radhiye Radhiye'?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and the joy of love, making it a perfect choice for couples.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Aayiram Vilakku'?

This song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, enhancing the emotional depth of the film's narrative.

Who are the singers of 'Radhiye Radhiye'?

The song features the talented voices of Chinmayi and Harish Ragavendra.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Radhiye Radhiye' was composed by Srikanth Deva.

When was 'Radhiye Radhiye' released?

The song was released on August 21, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Radhiye Radhiye, the romantic duet unfolds a beautiful narrative of love and longing, perfectly encapsulating the emotions of the lead characters in Aayiram Vilakku. The harmonious blend of Chinmayi and Harish Ragavendra's voices creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The song's melody and lyrics evoke feelings of joy and affection, making it an ideal choice for romantic occasions. Overall, it serves as a heartfelt expression of love that enhances the film's emotional landscape.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Radhiye Radhiye from Aayiram Vilakku is a captivating duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of Chinmayi and Harish Ragavendra, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the magic of Srikanth Deva's composition that makes this track a must-listen for lovebirds.
stanzaMeanings: Radhiye Radhiye
Movie: Aayiram Vilakku
Lyrics by Vairamuthu
Radhi, my Radhi, are you not?
Sagi, my Sagi, I am all yours.. (2)
You are making a sound like a bell
You are slowly killing me
Before I see you, I told God to go away
After seeing your eyes, I feel God exists
Radhi, my Radhi, are you not?
Sagi, my Sagi, I am all yours.. (2)
You are the one who brings love, you are the one who brings joy
You are the one who brings happiness
You are a boat for the night
You are a thief, you are strong in every way
You are the villain of my heart
You are the honey in my dress
Your love will spread like a flower
Your love will bloom like a flower
You are the artist that poets talk about
You are the one who brings knowledge to the world
I become a Buddha when I see your face
I lose my mind when I see your beauty, I lose it...
When you see me, a small flower blooms in the world
It brings honey to the bees
It will take away my shyness...
When you see me, the world will be filled with joy
The age will be filled with happiness
The skies will change
Two flowers are needed, they say
The garden will take care of everything
When the sky is filled with clouds, it is enough
When the sun sets, it is enough
I see the beauty in the clouds
I see that beauty in every moment, I see it...
Radhi, my Radhi, are you not?
Sagi, my Sagi, I am all yours.. (2)
You are making a sound like a bell
You are slowly killing me
Before I see you, I told God to go away
After seeing your eyes, I feel God exists
